title: tilia platyphyllos f. laciniata
intro: Tilia platyphyllos f. laciniata is a cultivar of the large-leaved lime tree, characterized by its deeply divided leaves. Traditionally, the leaves and flowers of Tilia platyphyllos f. laciniata have been used in herbal medicine for their calming and anti-inflammatory properties, which include being a mild sedative and a natural antiseptic. The health benefits of this plant include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and soothing digestive issues. Tilia platyphyllos f. laciniata can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, often in combination with other herbs, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and calmness.
